name: Holiday Spinach & Artichoke Party Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 (16 oz) carton (2 cups) sour cream, lite or regular
1 (1 oz) envelope HIDDEN VALLEY RANCH Original Ranch Party Mix
1 (14 oz) can artichoke hearts, rinsed and drained
1 (10 oz) package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained
1 (2 oz) jar diced pimientos, rinsed and drained
1 large round loaf of sourdough bread or any variety
1 large round loaf of sourdough bread or any variety, cut into cubes for dipping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream and party dip mix in a medium bowl.
2. Stir in artichokes, spinach, and pimientos.
3. Cut a slice off the top of the round loaf of bread.
4. Hollow out the center of the bread, leaving about 1-inch shell.
5. Reserve the bread pieces for dipping.
6. Spoon the dip into the bread shell.
7. Serve warm or cold. To serve warm, bake in a preheated 400-degree oven for 20-25 minutes.
8. Cover the loaf with foil if browning too quickly.
9. Serve with bread cubes and/or fresh vegetables.
10. Serves about 12.
